description: Baseline first-order rotor over reduced states.
Finite scheduler whose phase is the reduced state two steps back.
Simple 8-phase modulo scheduler over the second-order core.
Hybrid lag-2 plus 8-phase modulo scheduler with no explicit reset.
Hybrid lag-2 plus 8-phase modulo scheduler with higher-divisor resets.
Hybrid lag-2 plus 8-phase modulo scheduler with non-triad resets.
Second-order rotor with `current_winner_parity+previous_reduced_state` as an extra hidden-state label.
Lag-2 style scheduler whose phase is the previous `current_winner_parity+previous_reduced_state` label.
Hybrid reset scheduler whose reset trigger is the best `current_winner_parity+previous_reduced_state` label `odd|o2_higher_divisor_odd|17<=d<=64`.
